2009 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki

2008 in KSW 2009 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2010 in KSW

The year 2009 was the sixth year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. In 2009 Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki held 2 events beginning with, KSW 11: Khalidov vs. Acacio.

List of events

[edit]
# Event Title Date Arena Location
1 KSW 11: Khalidov vs. Acacio May 15, 2009 Hala Torwar Warsaw, Poland
2 KSW 12: Pudzianowski vs. Najman December 11, 2009 Hala Torwar Warsaw, Poland

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2009
# Weight Class Method Round Time Event Notes
1 Lightheavyweight 93 kg Mamed Khalidov def. Daniel Acacio Decision (unanimous) 1 1:10 KSW 11: Khalidov vs. Acacio For the KSW Light Heavyweight Championship.

KSW 11: Khalidov vs. Acacio

[edit]
KSW 11: Khalidov vs. Acacio
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateMay 15, 2009
VenueHala Torwar
City Warsaw, Poland
Event chronology
KSW 10 KSW 11: Khalidov vs. Acacio KSW 12

KSW 11: Khalidov vs. Acacio[1] was a mixed martial arts event held on May 15, 2009, at the Hala Torwar in Warsaw, Poland.

KSW 12: Pudzianowski vs. Najman

[edit]
KSW 12: Pudzianowski vs. Najman
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateDecember 11, 2009
VenueHala Torwar
City Warsaw, Poland
Attendance6000
Event chronology
KSW 11 KSW 12: Pudzianowski vs. Najman KSW Elimination

KSW 12: Pudzianowski vs. Najman[2] was a mixed martial arts event held on December 11, 2009, at the Hala Torwar in Warsaw, Poland.

Results

[edit]
Fight Card
Weight Class Method Round Notes
Middleweight 84 kg Vitor Nóbrega def. Aslambek Saidov Decision (Split - Extra Round) 4 Middleweight Tournament Final
